product_overview: Vivechana is a Hindi literary magazine and news aggregator mobile app that provides a curated home feed of news and articles, a guided onboarding experience, and user authentication to access personalized content.
core_goals: Guide new users through an onboarding flow to introduce app value and basic preferences
Authenticate users so they can access a personalized home feed
Allow users to discover and browse a curated list of Hindi news and articles
Open and read full article content from the home feed

features.name: Onboarding
features.description: A first-run guided experience that introduces the app, highlights key sections, and directs users to sign in to access personalized content.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Progress through onboarding slides -> Complete onboarding -> Navigate to /login

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users with email and password so they can access the authenticated home feed and personalized content.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit credentials -> Navigate to /home -> See home feed
Navigate to /login -> Leave a required field empty -> See form validation error

features.name: News Reading
features.description: Browse the home feed of curated Hindi news and open items to read full article details.
user_flows: Navigate to /home -> Scroll through article list -> Tap article to view details -> Navigate to /article_detail -> Read full article content

features.name: User Login
user_interactions: Enter credentials or sign in with Google
Navigate to home page on success
